channel.title: Mets Moneyline
channel.description: Daily NY Mets game analysis, moneyline value, and betting insights.

item.title: Mets vs. Washington Nationals - 2026-04-29 Betting Breakdown
item.description: David Peterson vs Cade Cavalli sets the matchup, but the strongest supported angle is starting pitching. xERA/FIP profile: David Peterson 4.78/3.76 vs Cade Cavalli 3.87/2.80; K-BB% 10.4 to 13.8. Sever
